queries.query:
SELECT 
    patient_id, 
    first_name, 
    last_name, 
    date_of_birth, 
    gender, 
    address, 
    phone_number 
FROM 
    patients 
WHERE 
    is_active = 1;

SELECT 
    patient_id, 
    first_name, 
    last_name, 
    date_of_birth, 
    gender, 
    address, 
    phone_number 
FROM 
    patients;

SELECT 
    provider_id, 
    provider_name, 
    specialty, 
    contact_info 
FROM 
    providers 
WHERE 
    is_active = 1;

SELECT 
    provider_id, 
    provider_name, 
    specialty, 
    phone_number, 
    email 
FROM 
    providers;

SELECT 
    v.visit_id,
    v.patient_id,
    v.provider_id,
    v.visit_date,
    v.visit_type,
    v.notes
FROM 
    visits v
WHERE 
    v.visit_date IS NULL 
    OR v.patient_id IS NULL 
    OR v.provider_id IS NULL 
    OR v.visit_type NOT IN ('Routine', 'Emergency', 'Follow-up');

SELECT 
    visit_id,
    patient_id,
    provider_id,
    visit_date,
    visit_type,
    notes
FROM 
    visits;

SELECT 
    m.medication_id, 
    m.patient_id, 
    m.provider_id, 
    m.medication_name, 
    m.dosage, 
    m.start_date, 
    m.end_date 
FROM 
    medications m 
WHERE 
    m.start_date IS NULL 
    OR m.end_date IS NULL 
    OR m.medication_name IS NULL 
    OR m.dosage IS NULL;

SELECT 
    medication_id,
    patient_id,
    provider_id,
    medication_name,
    dosage,
    frequency,
    start_date,
    end_date
FROM 
    target_medications;

SELECT 
    b.billing_id, 
    b.patient_id, 
    b.provider_id, 
    b.visit_id, 
    b.amount, 
    b.date 
FROM 
    billing b 
WHERE 
    b.amount IS NULL 
    OR b.date IS NULL 
    OR b.patient_id IS NULL 
    OR b.provider_id IS NULL 
    OR b.visit_id IS NULL;

SELECT 
    b.billing_id,
    b.patient_id,
    b.provider_id,
    b.amount,
    b.date,
    b.status
FROM 
    target.billing b
WHERE 
    b.amount < 0 OR 
    b.status NOT IN ('Paid', 'Pending', 'Denied') OR 
    b.date IS NULL;

FROM 
    target_medications;

SELECT 
    patient_id, 
    first_name, 
    last_name, 
    date_of_birth, 
    gender, 
    address, 
    phone_number 
FROM 
    patients 
WHERE 
    is_active = 1;
